title: Christophe Bontemps
text:
Data Scientist | Official Statistics | Data Visualization| A.I.|
Statistical Institute for Asia and the Pacific  United Nations - ESCAP


Specialized in Big Data and Data Science, with a focus on A.I. (machine learning) and data visualization. Member of the UN Committee of Experts on Big Data and Data Science.
Previously in academia at the Toulouse School of Economics, I have published several scientific papers and books in econometrics, data science, and environmental and food economics. I have a PhD in Applied Mathematics and master’s degrees in Econometrics and Computer Science from the University of Toulouse.









Machine learning & AI
Official statistics
Data Science
Data visualization






Training statisticians
Online teaching
Research on data communication

Applied analytics
